hero.desc_p1: We restore the balance of your environment with technical precision and total discretion. Specialists in
hero.desc_p2: for homes, companies, and the food sector.

species.desc_part1: Correctly identifying the species is the first step towards definitive eradication. At
species.desc_part2: we combine science with local experience.

germanica.title: German Cockroach
germanica.shortDesc: The most common pest in kitchens and catering. Small, fast, and highly prolific.
germanica.fullDesc: The German cockroach is the main problem in the food sector of Barcelona. At CECSA Urban Plagas we use gel bait technology to eradicate the entire nest without evacuation.
germanica.habitat: Indoors, areas of constant heat and humidity.
germanica.impact: Food contamination and reputation crises in businesses.

americana.title: American Cockroach
americana.shortDesc: The largest species. Reddish-colored, flies and mainly inhabits sewers.
americana.fullDesc: Known as the "super cockroach", can reach 5 cm. Access through pipes or flying. We apply long-lasting chemical barriers.
americana.habitat: Sewers, air chambers, and false ceilings.
americana.impact: Transmission of bacterial pathogens and strong visual impact.

oriental.title: Oriental Cockroach
oriental.shortDesc: Deep black in color, prefers cool and humid environments.
oriental.fullDesc: Associated with culverts and dirt areas. Our approach combines technical disinsectization with physical exclusion.
oriental.habitat: Basements, street-level manholes, and garbage areas.
oriental.impact: High allergen load and contamination on surfaces.

about.desc: Founded in Barcelona, CECSA was born from the need to raise sanitary environmental standards. We understand the urban ecosystem to intervene intelligently and sustainably.
about.quote: Our mission is to restore sanitary balance in every space, integrating cutting-edge technology with deep respect for the environment.
about.excelence_desc: Protocols based on applied scientific evidence.
about.ethics_desc: We act with environmental and social consciousness.

origen.title: Comprehensive Recovery of Squatted Homes
origen.slogan: We transform deteriorated spaces into dignified, safe homes ready for life again.
origen.desc: We offer a comprehensive recovery service for squatted or abandoned homes, designed to relieve the burden on owners and revaluate the property quickly and efficiently.
origen.process_title: We take care of the entire process:
origen.guarantee: With the experience and guarantee of CECSA Desinfeccions, we ensure an impeccable final result.
origen.goal: Turning a problem into an opportunity, recovering the value of your property with an efficient, discreet, and high-quality service.
